title: Xenium
description:
Xenium is a mod that adds a sword and armor,
the armor is just a little bit better then netherite.
The sword upon right clicking summons lightning in 5 seconds after doing so.
body: Xenium is a mod that adds a sword and armor, the armor is just a little bit better then netherite. The sword upon right clicking summons lightning in 5 seconds after doing so.
